data_sources.census: US Census Bureau ACS 5-Year Estimates 2023 (city/place level, aggregated to county via Wikipedia place-county mapping)
data_sources.presidential_2024: Wikipedia / Tennessee Secretary of State certified results (November 5, 2024)
data_sources.voter_registration_note: County-level voter registration not publicly available from TN SOS; state total ~4.97M active registrants as of November 2024. Voter registration estimated from total votes and state-level registered-voter turnout.
data_sources.census_limitation: Census data is aggregated from incorporated city/place level only. County totals exclude unincorporated areas and census-designated places (CDPs). Actual county populations are typically 20-80% higher. For full county-level census data, use ACS county-level tables directly.

race.group: Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander (non-Hispanic)
